topic: Best Apps for Planning a Trip with Friends (2026 Comparison)
primary_keyword: best apps for planning a trip with friends
secondary_keywords: best app for planning a trip with friends
audience: Friends organising group trips, bachelorettes, birthdays, ski weekends, and international getaways
angle: Give readers a real comparison based on what usually breaks first in group-trip planning: picking dates, building an itinerary, splitting costs, and keeping everyone in sync.

brand.name: TRYPS
brand.product_description: A group trip planning app for friends with date polling, shared itinerary, expense splitting, and a no-download invite link.
brand.tone_of_voice: Direct, warm, slightly dry. No corporate fluff.
differentiators: date polling built into the trip flow
shared itinerary for the whole group
expense splitting in the same app

sources.title: TRYPS homepage
sources.excerpt: TRYPS positions itself as a group trip planning app for friends with one-link invite, group date poll, shared itinerary, split expenses, and real-time updates.

sources.title: Wanderlog plan-a-trip page
sources.excerpt: Wanderlog highlights itinerary building, route planning, budgeting, packing lists, maps, and recommendations for travel planning.

sources.title: Wanderlog Android app listing
sources.excerpt: The listing describes Wanderlog as free for planning trips including group travel, with collaboration, route optimisation, reservation imports, and map-based planning.

sources.title: Splitwise homepage
sources.excerpt: Splitwise focuses on shared expenses, balances, groups, and settling up with friends, including trips.

sources.title: TripIt how it works
sources.excerpt: TripIt creates itineraries by having users forward confirmation emails to plans@tripit.com and then builds a comprehensive itinerary that can be shared.

sources.title: TripIt getting started
sources.excerpt: TripIt says users can forward confirmation emails or use Inbox Sync, then share plans with family, friends, and coworkers.

sources.title: Google Sheets product page
sources.excerpt: Google Sheets emphasizes online collaborative spreadsheets, co-editing, comments, access controls, version history, and working across devices.

article.cta_label: One tool that handles all of it.
article.hero_image_alt: Friends coordinating a trip plan across dates, itinerary, and shared costs
